name: Perfection Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. For the crust: Combine flour and salt in a bowl. Cut in Crisco until mixture forms pea-sized chunks.
3. Add water and toss lightly with a fork until dough forms a ball. Press into a 5-6 inch circle between two sheets of parchment paper.
4. Roll out dough to form a circle larger than an upside-down 9-inch pie plate. Carefully loosen dough, fold it into quarters, and transfer to the pie plate.
5. Fold edge under and flute as desired. Trim excess dough overhang.
6. For the filling: In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until light. Beat in eggs, corn syrup, and vanilla extract.
7. Stir in pecans. Pour filling into the unbaked crust.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 5 minutes. Reduce temperature to 325°F (165°C) and bake for an additional 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow pie to cool to room temperature before cutting.
